title: A Speculation.
content:
Of all speculations the market holds forth,
        The best that I know for a lover of pelf,
    Is to buy Marcus up, at the price he is worth,
        And then sell him at that which he sets on himself.
meaning:
"A Speculation." is a quintessential example of Thomas Moore's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
